---
title: "Team"
---

## Principal investigator

::: {.team-member}
### Julian Gendreau, MD

Department of Neurological Surgery, Oregon Health & Science University  
*Add title, clinical interests, and lab role.*
:::

## Researchers and collaborators

::: {.team-member}
### Garin Griffith

Medical student, OHSU School of Medicine  
Research interests: neurosurgical outcomes, predictive modeling, registry-based research, clinical informatics.
:::

::: {.team-member}
### Add collaborator name

Role, affiliation, project area.
:::

## Add team members

Use this format:

```markdown
::: {.team-member}
### Name, degree

Role, affiliation  
Research interests or project role.
:::
```
